reasoning: WHAT YOU FOUND: Order #000000780 shows a complete status but the order confirmation email was not sent. The order was placed on Aug 9, 2025, at 7:22:19 AM. The customer's billing and shipping addresses are the same, and the payment method is Check / Money order. The order total is $93.29, and it has been fully invoiced and shipped. There are no notes or comments on the order, and no history of previous orders or customer interactions is visible on this page. WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order Details page, Account Information section, Payment & Shipping Method section, Order Totals section. WHY IT MATTERS: The absence of an order confirmation email and the lack of customer interaction history raise questions about the legitimacy of the order. The payment method (Check / Money order) and the complete status without any customer communication or notes warrant further investigation to ensure the order is legitimate and to prevent potential fraud or chargebacks. Additional information and verification are needed before making a final decision.
